title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBI - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - RBI - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at RBI are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About RBI:
RBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBI!
